raw_consumer_statement: My citicard credit card was hacked by someone in another state. The person set up several preauthorized merchants that are fraudulent and keeps charging the credit card. I've reported the disputed charges each time and they are taken off my account and then citicards issues a new card. Each time, the fraudulent person gets the new account number, probably through an account updater program and continues to make fraudulent charges. I've spoken with the fraud department and have told them to not update my card to ANY account associated with it but this keeps happening. They only block the merchant associated with the fraud, but then the fraudster uses a different pre-approved merchant. Even when the card is locked, charges are getting made to it. I need to have everything associated with the card blocked from use so that the fraudster doesn't keep opening up preauthorized subscriptions. No one at Citicards seems to know how to do this.
